paragraphs.text: Six identity programs assembled for institutions and labels who refuse decoration in favor of posture. Each system is a piece of architecture: rules first, surfaces second, silence wherever possible.
A hand-thrown ceramics label whose rings echo the kiln’s breath.
An imprint for slow essays bound in tactile, voltaic counterpoint.
A nocturnal distillery whose wordmark cuts like a wing in moonlight.
A bureau whose identity shifts depending on where the reader stands.
Couture in shadow tones — a system stitched from a single curve.
An eight-day festival mapped onto the city as a circular score.

Several clients prefer their identity to predate their announcement. If you are evaluating Obsidian Fold for a confidential program — a museum re-brand, a foundation launch, a label re-positioning — we share private case files under NDA.
A boutique brand-identity studio building visual systems for cultural institutions and independent luxury labels. Vienna, since 2017.

visibleText: Obsidian Fold Manifesto Work Process Studio Contact Index 02 — Selected Works 2017—2024 Folded Evidence. Six identity programs assembled for institutions and labels who refuse decoration in favor of posture. Each system is a piece of architecture: rules first, surfaces second, silence wherever possible. Cases 06 projects Disciplines Strategy / Type / Motion Years 2017 — 2024 Locations VIE · BER · LIS · NYC The Catalogue Six of twenty-four shown Case / 01 — 2019 Crater Ceramics A hand-thrown ceramics label whose rings echo the kiln’s breath. Identity · Packaging Case / 02 — 2020 Vellum & Volta Publishing An imprint for slow essays bound in tactile, voltaic counterpoint. Editorial · Typography Case / 03 — 2021 Nachtfalke Spirits A nocturnal distillery whose wordmark cuts like a wing in moonlight. Brand · Bottle System Case / 04 — 2022 Parallax Architecture A bureau whose identity shifts depending on where the reader stands. Wayfinding · Print Case / 05 — 2023 Sable Thread Atelier Couture in shadow tones — a system stitched from a single curve. Festival · Motion Selected · Not Comprehensive Eighteen more cases under embargo. Several clients prefer their identity to predate their announcement.
